title: スプリングSの後に・クラシック三冠へ

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete. I executed all your orders
successfully, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I owe it to the effective strengthening of my body
from incremental, daily training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I estimate that I now have the ability to compete
in the Satsuki Sho. Thank you very much.
choice_data_list:
Let's keep it up and do our best at the Satsuki
Sho too!

text_block_list.text:
We've built a great track record so far, and now
it's finally time to go for the Satsuki Sho!
